name: GHP Specialty Care AB (publ)
summary: GHP Specialty Care AB (publ) provides healthcare services in the Nordic region and internationally. The company operates specialist clinics that offer services in various areas, including orthopaedics, spine surgery/spine care, obesity surgery and diabetes care, gastroenterology, urology, general surgery, arrhythmia, sports medicine, neurology, skin, and specialist dentistry. It operates 22 specialty care clinics in the Nordic Region. The company was formerly known as Global Health Partner AB (publ) and changed its name to GHP Specialty Care AB (publ) in May 2015. GHP Specialty Care AB (publ) was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.
